name: Moist Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Thoroughly grease a muffin tray with 12 large muffin cups and set aside until ready to use.
3. In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat the egg whites until frothy.
4. Add the sugar and beat for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the applesauce, milk, maple syrup, and vanilla.
6. Add the flour, baking powder, and salt and mix just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Gently fold in the blueberries.
8. Spoon the batter into the greased muffin cups.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 - 25 minutes or until golden and the center springs back when gently pressed.
10. Remove the muffins from the oven and set on a metal cooling rack for 10 - 20 minutes.
11. Using a knife, cut around each muffin and gently ease them out of the pan. Make sure they don't fall apart.
12. Set on the cooling rack.
Makes 12 muffins.
